member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.FileHandler
member.summary: Main file handler implementation. For basic file IOs operations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.IFileHandler
member.summary: File handling interfaces. Usage of FileService is preferred.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.IFileHandler.FileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file exists.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.IFileHandler.GetFile(System.String)
member.summary: Returns filepath normalized by the FileService (local or SysC remote path).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.IFileHandler.ReadAll(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.IFileHandler.GetText(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a file, reads it's text, and returns contents as a string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ConfigurationSets
member.summary: Json serializing class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ConfigurationSets.ConfigurationName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the ConfigurationSet. Must be unique.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ConfigurationSets.Measurements
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of measurements to apply during impedance Testing.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceConfiguration
member.summary: Json serializing class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceConfiguration.ConfigSets
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of configuration sets to run for dc measurements.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.Measurement
member.summary: Json serializing class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.Measurement.Settings
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of settings to apply before DC tests.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.MeasurementSetting
member.summary: Json serializing class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.MeasurementSetting.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of pins to apply the measurement settings to.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.MeasurementSetting.PinSetting
member.summary: Gets or sets the measurement settings to apply to the list of pins.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting
member.summary: Json serializing class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.Opmode
member.summary: Gets or sets the opmode in the measurement setting.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.LimitHigh
member.summary: Gets or sets the high limit for all pins in the measurement setting.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.LimitLow
member.summary: Gets or sets the low limit for all pins in the measurement setting.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.ForceValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the force value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.PreMeasurementDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the pre measurment delay.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.ClampHigh
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for a clamp high. Will be set to auto clamp if left blank.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.ClampLow
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for a clamp low. Will be set to auto clamp if left blank.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.IRange
member.summary: Gets or sets the measurement range for the pins. If left blank it is set to "auto".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting.SamplingCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling count. Default is 1 if not set.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest
member.summary: General measurement mode interface.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestCreator,Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure,Prime.TestConditionService.ITestConditionService,Prime.PinService.IPinService,Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Object set during offline verify which holds configuration data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.SettingsToApply
member.summary: Gets or sets measurement settings to be applied during execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.SavedPins
member.summary: Gets or sets pin objects according to names to prevent unnecessary calls to pin service.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.PlistName
member.summary: Gets or sets final plist to be tested(either pu or pd).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.FuncLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the func level name used when creating tests.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.DcLevels
member.summary: Gets or sets the DC level name used when creating tests.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.TimingName
member.summary: Gets or sets the timing name used when creating test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance name used when creating test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.EndSeqLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the end sequence level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ConfigurationSets
member.summary: Gets or sets measurement configuration set.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets masks pins for the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.TargetResistance
member.summary: Gets or sets the target resistance for the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.PatConfigHandle
member.summary: Gets or sets the target resistance for the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.EndSeqTestCondition
member.summary: Gets or sets the end seq test condition for the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the target resistance for the test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.Execute
member.summary: Executes impedance test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.Dec2Bin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Decimal to Binary converter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.GetAttributeValues(Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting)
member.summary: Gets attribute values from a pin setting.
member.returns: list of attributes ready to be applied.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ApplyAttributeValues(Prime.PinService.IPin,Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting)
member.summary: Applies attribute values to level for given pin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ValidateMode
member.summary: Validates configuration based on mode of test being performed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ExecuteMode(System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes configuration based on selected mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ExecuteImpedanceTest
member.summary: Execute impedance test.
member.returns: True if execution was successful, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.Verify
member.summary: Calls verify on current mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.SetupDcLevel
member.summary: Setup DC level.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ValidateMeasurementSettings
member.summary: Validates a list of settings for a measurement. Also populates pinlist table for future gets.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.SavePinSettings(Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.MeasurementSetting,System.String)
member.summary: Populates pin settings object with pin/setting pairs.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.GetAllPinsFromList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets all pins that are in list of pinNames.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.GetAllSubPinNames(System.String)
member.summary: Gets subpins from a given pin name recursively.
member.returns: list consisting of all sub pin names for the given pin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.RunDcTest(System.Int32)
member.summary: runs a DC test for a single pin and returns result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ExtractSinglePinGroupResults(System.String,Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult,Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting)
member.summary: Extracts list of pin results from an IDCResults object.
member.param: Pin Group to extract results from.
Singular IDCResults object to be processed.
Settings that were used during execute.
member.returns: List of pin result objects extracted from dcResults.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ExtractSinglePinResults(System.String,Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult,Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting)
member.summary: Extracts results for a single pin Dc test.
member.param: Singular IDCResults object to be processed.
Setting that was used during execute.
member.returns: List of measurement results from single pin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.ImpedanceTest.ProcessResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult},System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult}@)
member.summary: Process results into pass/fail list.
member.param: list of results on measurement execution.
list of passing results on measurement execution.
member.returns: True is no fail results.False if otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TerminationCharacterization
member.summary: PullDown Impedance mode.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Object set during offline verify which holds configuration data.
Dc test creator object, used to create DcTest objects.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod
member.summary: Prime Hptp Impedance Test Method class.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Dc test creator object, used to create DcTest objects.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.FuncLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets func levels to be apply prior to pattern execution(this will contain all the preconditioning setup e.g pwr sequencing etc).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.DcLevels
member.summary: Gets or sets dc levels to be applied after the plist execution to set up and trigger DC measurements. Override measurement configuration setup when exist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.TargetResistance
member.summary: Gets or sets target resistance to achieve.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.MeasConfigFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the json file which contains Pin measurement configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.MeasConfigSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the configset.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.PatConfigName
member.summary: Gets or sets the patconfigName.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the CTV pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.EndSequenceLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the end seq level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets the IO operations file handler.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.ValidatePinSetting(Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting)
member.summary: Validates a setting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.ValidateOpMode(Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting)
member.summary: Validates Opmode for setting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.ValidateLimits(Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting)
member.summary: Validates High and low attributes make sense for setting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.GetMeasConfigurationFromJson(System.String)
member.summary: This function parses the json file and stores its data and returns the deserialized object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpImpedanceTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper to inject required dependencies during runtime.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult
member.summary: Object that holds reuslts from the measurement of impedance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Boolean,System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: List of current value for the pin.
List of voltage value for the pin.
List of resistance value for the pin.
boolean to determine if rterm is from mean or from slope.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.CurrentList
member.summary: Gets or sets list of current value for the pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.VoltageList
member.summary: Gets or sets list of voltage value for the pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.ResistanceList
member.summary: Gets or sets list of resistance value for the pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.Mean
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether rterm is from mean or from slope.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.RtermSlope
member.summary: Gets or sets rterm value for the pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.Calcode
member.summary: Gets or sets calcode value in used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.ImpedanceResult.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets Pin name for given result.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult
member.summary: Object that holds information result of measurement setting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult.#ctor(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting,System.Boolean,System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: measurment setting that was applied for the given test.
Whether or not the test passed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult.TestResult
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the test passed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult.MeasuredValue
member.summary: Gets or sets Measured value of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets Pin name for given result.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementResult.MeasurementSetting
member.summary: Gets or sets measurement setting that was applied for the given test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting
member.summary: Object that holds information needed for applying measurement setting.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting.#ctor(Prime.PinService.IPin,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PinSetting,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Pin that setting is being applied to.
Pin name of pin setting is being applied to.
Attributes to be applied to pin.
Dc level to be applied to pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting.Pin
member.summary: Gets or sets Pin that setting is being applied to.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets Pin name of pin setting is being applied to.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting.PinSetting
member.summary: Gets or sets Attributes to be applied to pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.TestObjects.MeasurementSetting.DcLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets DcLevel to be applied to pin.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure
member.summary: Centralized data structure to be populated during VerifyOffline() and restored in Init().

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.ConfigurationFileContent
member.summary: Gets or sets the contents for the Impedance Json configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.SelectedConfigurationSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected configuration set from the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.TargetResistance
member.summary: Gets or sets value indicating target resistance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets masks pins for the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.PlistName
member.summary: Gets or sets final plist determined for the test(either pu or pd).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.PatConfigHandle
member.summary: Gets or sets patconfighandle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.FuncLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets func level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.DcLevels
member.summary: Gets or sets dc level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.Timing
member.summary: Gets or sets Timings used for Functional test pre-conditioning.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of current instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.EndSeqLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of end seq level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.VerifyDataStructure.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets session context.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.NominalMode
member.summary: Used to select whether to set back to nominal mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.NominalMode.TRUE
member.summary: Reset to nominal

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.NominalMode.FALSE
member.summary: No reset to nominal

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.CalibrationType
member.summary: Used to select calibration type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.CalibrationType.RX_BASED
member.summary: RX based

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.CalibrationType.TX_BASED
member.summary: TX based

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExeMode
member.summary: Used to select mode of Setup test to execute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExeMode.TIMING_CALIBRATION
member.summary: Execute TIMING_CALIBRATION

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExeMode.TERMSHIFTCODE_PATMOD
member.summary: Execute ONLY TERMSHIFTCODE_PATMOD

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExeMode.TIMING_OVERRIDE
member.summary: Execute ONLY TIMING_OVERRIDE

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExeMode.VOX_OVERRIDE
member.summary: Execute ONLY VOX_OVERRIDE

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExeMode.PATMOD_AND_TIMING_OVERRIDE
member.summary: Execute both TERMSHIFTCODE_PATMOD and TIMING_OVERRIDE

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute the timing calibration on.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibratePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for timing calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibrationNames
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated Params for timing calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibrateTxNames
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated TX param for timing calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibrateRxNames
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated RX param for timing calibration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalPatmodConfiguration
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration to patch the termination codes in the timing calibration pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.StartLargeOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the static value for the starting point in the Y axis for the 1D shmoo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.XAxisDriveOffsetParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global drive offset parameter for the RX pins. XAxisDriveOffsetParameter is deprecated, please use SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter and LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global drive/strobe offset parameter. Use along with LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter and CalibrationMode parameters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.YAxisStrobeOffsetParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global strobe offset parameter for the TX pins. YAxisStrobeOffsetParameter is deprecated, please use SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter and LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.LargeCalibrationOffsetParameter
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global drive/strobe offset parameter. Use along with SmallCalibrationOffsetParameter and CalibrationMode parameters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingCalibrationRange
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum swing range for the timing calibration to take place.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.CalTDRRegisterFieldSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the field sequence value of the cal tdr register to be patmod into the pattern.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.OutputTokenPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the prefix used in the output timing token.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.OutputTokenPostfix
member.summary: Gets or sets the postfix used in the output timing token, leave empty for no post fix.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.EyeWidthLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the eyewidth limit.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ResetToNominal
member.summary: Gets or sets the option to restore the timing specs after the test is executed.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.CalibrationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets calibration mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.MaxCaptures
member.summary: Gets or sets maximum number of captures admited before pattern execution is stopped.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets ExeMode(TIMING_CALIBRATION, TERMSHIFTCODE_PATMOD, TIMING_OVERRIDE, VOX_OVERRIDE or PATMOD_AND_TIMING_OVERRIDE).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingOverrideDriveParams
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the global drive offset parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingOverrideDriveValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for the global drive offset param, can be a number or a GlobalStorage variable, either SharedstorageToken or hardcoded.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingOverrideDriveOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for additional offset require for drive param.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingOverrideStrobeParams
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated params of the name of the perpin strobe offset parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.TimingOverrideStrobeValues
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or a GlobalStorage variable, either SharedstorageToken or hardcoded.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.VoxTxOverridePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or a GlobalStorage variable, either SharedstorageToken or hardcoded.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.VoxRxOverridePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or a GlobalStorage variable, either SharedstorageToken or hardcoded.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.VoxTxOverrideParams
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or a GlobalStorage variable, either SharedstorageToken or hardcoded.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.VoxRxOverrideParams
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated values for the name of the perpin strobe offset param, can be a number or a GlobalStorage variable, either SharedstorageToken or hardcoded.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.VoxSupplyParam
member.summary: Gets or sets Vox Supply Parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.RunTimingCalibration(System.Double)
member.summary: Runs the timing calibration test for all the lanes in the TimingCalibratePins list.
member.param: The starting point in the Y axis for the 1D shmoo.
member.returns: State of the timing calibration, true if calibration was possible, false if not.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hptp.PrimeHptpTimingCalibrationTestMethod.GetInitialTimingTC
member.summary: Populates the parameterDefault list once per verify (once per TP run).
